positive: A highly detailed, stylized illustration of a cosmic river flowing through a vibrant forest at dusk. The river is formed by bioluminescent nebulae and stardust, flowing past majestic, stylized ancient trees with glowing bark and oversized leaves. Deep indigo and emerald green dominate the palette, accented by pops of fiery orange and lavender light from the nebula. The composition is symmetrical and centralized, allowing for clean cutting and visual impact on fabric. Cinematic lighting, high contrast, line art quality combined with soft glow, vector illustration style, designed for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, grain, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, messy background, poor anatomy, extra limbs, bokeh
